hero.badge: AI-powered error intelligence · Free to start
hero.title: Your errors, explained. Your fixes, ready.
hero.subtitle: Paste any error message. Fixr tells you exactly what broke, why it happened, and how to fix it — in seconds.

trustBar.item2Desc: Average time from error to fix
trustBar.item3Desc: Python, JS, Rust, Go, Java and more

features.title: Not a search engine. A debugging partner.
features.subtitle: Most tools tell you what the error is. Fixr tells you why it happened and exactly what to do next.
features.f1Body: Fixr doesn't just name the error type. It traces back through your stack, identifies the exact line and data flow that caused it, and explains it in plain English — with a confidence score so you know how certain the analysis is.
features.f2Title: A fix you can actually apply
features.f2Body: No vague suggestions. Fixr gives you numbered steps with copy-paste code snippets, targeted to your exact error and file. Apply it, move on.
features.f3Body: Python, JavaScript, TypeScript, Rust, Go, Java, Swift, Ruby, SQL, CSS and 20+ more. Paste any error from any language and Fixr handles it.
features.f4Body: Upgrade to Pro and bring Fixr into your workflow. Pipe errors directly from your build output, analyze log files, and get explanations without leaving your editor.

howItWorks.title: From error to fix in three steps
howItWorks.s1Body: Copy any error message, stack trace, or build output and paste it into Fixr. No formatting required. It works with messy, truncated, or minified output too.
howItWorks.s2Body: Our AI reads your stack trace, identifies the root cause, and maps it back to your specific file and line. Not a generic answer — an explanation written for your exact error.
howItWorks.s3Body: You get a plain-English explanation of what happened, why it happened, and a step-by-step fix with code. Copy it, apply it, ship.

pricing.title: Simple pricing. No surprises.
pricing.subtitle: Start free. Upgrade when you need more.
pricing.freeTagline: For developers who want to try Fixr
pricing.proTagline: For developers who debug every day

reviews.title: Built for the frustration every developer knows
reviews.r1Quote: Saved me 45 minutes on a cryptic TypeScript error. The explanation was clearer than anything on Stack Overflow and the fix worked first try.
reviews.r2Quote: The 'why it happened' section is what makes Fixr different. I actually understand the error now, not just blindly copying a fix.
reviews.r3Quote: Junior devs on my team use it every day. The number of errors they escalate to me has dropped by half. Genuinely impressive.
reviews.r4Quote: I used it on a Rust lifetime error I had been staring at for two hours. It explained it better than the official Rust docs. Subscribed immediately.

cta.title: Stop losing hours to errors you don't understand.
cta.subtitle: 100 free explanations every month. No account required to start. No credit card ever.
cta.microcopy: Free forever · No credit card · Works in your browser
